message:
🐛 Fix 26-route TypeError crashes and GPU Overview card visibility (#11046)

Three compliance dashboard components (GxPDashboard, RiskRegisterDashboard,
SBOMDashboard) crash when the catch-all API mock returns [] instead of the
expected object shape. The empty array passes truthiness checks (summary &&)
but accessing .config.enabled, .avg_risk_score.toFixed(), and
.scan_status.replace() on an array element produces TypeError.

Fixes:
- Validate API response shape before setting state in all three dashboards
- Add optional chaining (?.) and nullish coalescing (??) as defense-in-depth
  at all property access sites (.enabled, .toFixed, .replace)
- Guard useMetricsHistory .toFixed() and ThemeSection .replace() calls
- Add null-safe access in useCachedOpenfeature for flag/provider items
- Relax GPUOverview hasReachableClusters check to work in demo/mock mode

Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
